location: Oratory Church of St Wilfrid, York, North Yorkshire
method: Father Daniel's Silver Jubilee Of Priesthood Doubles
footnotes: Rung to celebrate the Silver Jubilee of Priesthood of Father Daniel, priest here at this church
The variation 50xz (Gedney Hill Place with a YCG Bob) is rung for the first time. The band would like to name this variation "Father Daniel's Silver Jubilee Of Priesthood Doubles".
